Who We Are

Excellence in Every Care

AASI Multispeciality Hospital — Ramnad's premier healthcare institution combining medical expertise with compassionate care.

0

🎯 Vision
To provide the best available medical practice with highest international standards of patient care, with unrelenting attention to medical excellence and patient safety.
🚀 Mission
Developing healthcare reputation, pioneering new standards, incorporating information technologies — all while keeping patients at the heart of every decision.

Infrastructure

World-Class Facilities

🔬
Theatre Facility
4 theatres (3 major + 1 minor), laparoscopic, endoscopy, C-Arm, operating microscopes & defibrillators.
💊
24-Hour Pharmacy
Round-the-clock pharmacy ensuring medicines are available whenever patients need them.
🏥
ICU Ward
7 beds with invasive & non-invasive monitors, pulse oximeters, infusion pumps, central oxygen & suction.
❤️
CCU Ward
7 beds with 2 ventilators, ECG, defibrillator, central oxygen and full monitoring capabilities.
👶
NICU Ward
4 beds with incubator, warmer, photo therapy unit, infusion pump and ventilator for neonatal care.
🫀
Cath Lab
State-of-the-art catheterization laboratory for cardiac interventions and diagnostics.
🩻
CT Scan & Imaging
Advanced: CT scan, 2D-Echo, TMT, EEG, X-ray, ultrasound, audiometry, optometry — 24 hrs.
🔴
Dialysis Centre
4 dedicated dialysis units providing life-saving renal support therapy for kidney patients.

Our Location

HoursEmergency: 24 Hours, 7 Days a Week
